# LibreDash

> Dashboards-as-code BI with generated, machine-readable CLI, API, configuration, and visual documentation.

## Agent entry points

- [Documentation MCP](/mcp): read-only Streamable HTTP MCP with docs_catalog, docs_search, and docs_read tools.
- [CLI manifest](/docs/cli/manifest.json): versioned command syntax, arguments, flags, defaults, side effects, and confirmation behavior.
- [API operation manifest](/docs/api/operations.json): versioned operation IDs, routes, authorization, safety metadata, and request/response schemas.
- [OpenAPI schema](/docs/openapi.yaml): complete generated OpenAPI contract.

Focused slices are available at `/docs/cli/commands/{id}.json|md` and `/docs/api/operations/{operationId}.json|md`. Prefer search and focused reads over loading complete manifests. Public documentation tools never execute commands or API operations.

## Documentation

### Start here

- [What is LibreDash?](/docs/introduction): Understand the problems LibreDash solves and its code-native model.
- [Installation](/docs/installation): Pull the public image locally or prepare a durable production instance.
- [Get started with LibreDash](/docs/getting-started): Bootstrap, edit, and run the included project from a source checkout.
- [Build your first dashboard](/docs/first-dashboard): Change a model and dashboard and deploy it locally.
- [Project structure](/docs/project-structure): Learn how project-global resources and workspace resources are organized.

### Core concepts

- [Core concepts](/docs/concepts): A map of the concepts used throughout LibreDash.
- [Projects, workspaces, and environments](/docs/concepts/projects-workspaces-environments): Understand ownership, isolation, and deployment scope.
- [Connections and sources](/docs/concepts/connections-sources): Separate physical data access from reusable logical source definitions.
- [Model tables](/docs/concepts/model-tables): Materialize reusable analytical tables from source data.
- [Semantic models](/docs/concepts/semantic-models): Define datasets, dimensions, measures, and relationships once.
- [Dashboards, pages, and visuals](/docs/concepts/dashboards): Understand the presentation resources rendered by the BI workspace.
- [Query and interaction lifecycle](/docs/concepts/query-lifecycle): Follow a user interaction from signals through DuckDB and back.

### Build dashboards

- [Build dashboards](/docs/guides/build): Follow the dashboard-as-code authoring workflow.
- [Connect a data source](/docs/guides/build/connect-data): Add a connection and source definitions to a project.
- [Define model tables](/docs/guides/build/model-tables): Turn source data into stable analytical tables.
- [Build a semantic model](/docs/guides/build/semantic-model): Expose reusable fields, measures, and relationships.
- [Create a dashboard](/docs/guides/build/dashboard): Define a workspace dashboard and its first report page.
- [Pages and layout](/docs/guides/build/pages-layout): Compose responsive report pages from code.
- [Filters and interactions](/docs/guides/build/filters-interactions): Configure filter cards and cross-visual selections.
- [Tables, matrices, and pivots](/docs/guides/build/tables): Choose and configure tabular BI surfaces.
- [Dashboard authoring patterns](/docs/guides/build/patterns): Apply maintainable modeling and presentation conventions.

### Manage data

- [Managed data ingestion](/docs/data-ingestion): Plan, stage, and activate immutable project-global data revisions.
- [Data revisions and activation](/docs/guides/data/revisions): Understand revision identity and atomic activation.
- [Materialization and refresh](/docs/guides/data/refresh): Refresh model tables without disrupting active queries.
- [Storage and recovery](/docs/guides/data/storage-recovery): Operate local or object-backed analytical storage safely.
- [Data troubleshooting](/docs/guides/data/troubleshooting): Diagnose planning, upload, revision, and refresh failures.

### Deploy and operate

- [Deploy and operate LibreDash](/docs/guides/operate): Understand the production delivery and operations workflow.
- [Validate, plan, and deploy](/docs/cli/validate-deploy): Use the standard atomic delivery workflow.
- [Targets and environments](/docs/cli/targets): Keep local, staging, and production changes explicit.
- [Production configuration](/docs/guides/operate/production-configuration): Configure secrets, storage, auth, and runtime boundaries.
- [Self-hosting](/docs/guides/operate/self-hosting): Build and run a supported single-node deployment.
- [Health and observability](/docs/guides/operate/observability): Monitor health, query activity, refreshes, and deployments.
- [Backup and restore](/docs/guides/operate/backup-restore): Create, validate, and restore consistent instance backups.
- [Upgrades and migrations](/docs/guides/operate/upgrades): Upgrade binaries and persistent state with rollback boundaries.
- [Operational troubleshooting](/docs/guides/operate/troubleshooting): Diagnose deployment and runtime failures systematically.

### Security and administration

- [Authentication and authorization](/docs/enterprise-auth): Understand LibreDash identity and authorization boundaries.
- [Local authentication](/docs/security/local-auth): Configure self-hosted and break-glass local users.
- [OIDC](/docs/security/oidc): Connect an enterprise identity provider for browser login.
- [SCIM provisioning](/docs/security/scim): Provision users, groups, and memberships from a directory.
- [Roles, grants, and policies](/docs/security/authorization): Assign least-privilege access to securable resources.
- [Service principals and API tokens](/docs/security/tokens): Authenticate non-human workloads with scoped credentials.
- [Audit events](/docs/security/audit): Inspect security and administrative activity.

### Integrate

- [Integrate with LibreDash](/docs/integrate): Choose between CLI, API, and agent integration surfaces.
- [CLI overview](/docs/cli): Install, authenticate, validate, plan, and deploy with the CLI.
- [Install and authenticate the CLI](/docs/cli/authentication): Configure targets and use API tokens safely.
- [API quickstart](/docs/guides/integrate/api-quickstart): Authenticate and call the headless API.
- [API conventions](/docs/guides/integrate/api-conventions): Handle authentication, errors, and pagination consistently.
- [Headless BI queries](/docs/guides/integrate/headless-bi): Query dashboards and semantic models through stable contracts.
- [Agent integrations](/docs/guides/integrate/agent): Configure agent policies, tools, and conversations.
- [Automation and CI](/docs/cli/automation): Run validation and deployments safely in CI.

### Reference

- [Reference](/docs/reference): Find exact syntax and supported contracts.
- [Environment variable reference](/docs/configuration): Process-wide settings generated from the runtime configuration specification.
- [Supported capabilities](/docs/reference/capabilities): Review supported resource, data, visual, and integration surfaces.
- [CLI troubleshooting](/docs/cli/troubleshooting): Diagnose local validation and remote operation failures.

#### Configuration

- [Configuration reference](/docs/config): Choose a resource kind and open its generated field reference and JSON Schema.
- [Project configuration](/docs/config/project): Fields and validation rules for the Project YAML resource.
- [Connection configuration](/docs/config/connection): Fields and validation rules for the Connection YAML resource.
- [Source configuration](/docs/config/source): Fields and validation rules for the Source YAML resource.
- [Workspace configuration](/docs/config/workspace): Fields and validation rules for the Workspace YAML resource.
- [Model Table configuration](/docs/config/model-table): Fields and validation rules for the ModelTable YAML resource.
- [Semantic Model configuration](/docs/config/semantic-model): Fields and validation rules for the SemanticModel YAML resource.
- [Dashboard configuration](/docs/config/dashboard): Fields and validation rules for the Dashboard YAML resource.
- [Workspace Group configuration](/docs/config/workspace-group): Fields and validation rules for the WorkspaceGroup YAML resource.
- [Workspace Role Binding configuration](/docs/config/workspace-role-binding): Fields and validation rules for the WorkspaceRoleBinding YAML resource.
- [Grant configuration](/docs/config/grant): Fields and validation rules for the Grant YAML resource.
- [Data Policy configuration](/docs/config/data-policy): Fields and validation rules for the DataPolicy YAML resource.
- [Workspace Agent Policy configuration](/docs/config/workspace-agent-policy): Fields and validation rules for the WorkspaceAgentPolicy YAML resource.
- [Refresh Pipeline configuration](/docs/config/refresh-pipeline): Fields and validation rules for the RefreshPipeline YAML resource.

#### CLI commands

- [CLI command reference](/docs/cli/reference): Browse every generated LibreDash command.
- [libredash admin](/docs/cli/admin): Administrative utilities
- [libredash agent](/docs/cli/agent): Use the LibreDash read-only agent
- [libredash api](/docs/cli/api): Call any generated LibreDash API operation
- [libredash config](/docs/cli/config): Inspect and validate process-global configuration
- [libredash dashboards](/docs/cli/dashboards): Inspect dashboards
- [libredash data](/docs/cli/data): Manage project-global data revisions
- [libredash deploy](/docs/cli/deploy): Atomically deploy a configuration-as-code project
- [libredash healthcheck](/docs/cli/healthcheck): Check the local LibreDash readiness endpoint
- [libredash login](/docs/cli/login): Store a LibreDash API token for a target
- [libredash plan](/docs/cli/plan): Emit a deterministic configuration-as-code plan
- [libredash schema](/docs/cli/schema): Inspect LibreDash YAML schemas
- [libredash search](/docs/cli/search): Search workspace assets
- [libredash semantic-models](/docs/cli/semantic-models): Inspect semantic models
- [libredash serve](/docs/cli/serve): Run the LibreDash HTTP server
- [libredash validate](/docs/cli/validate): Validate a configuration-as-code project
- [libredash workspaces](/docs/cli/workspaces): Inspect workspaces

#### API reference

- [API reference](/docs/api): Browse the generated headless API contract.
- [System](/docs/api/system): API capabilities and protocol discovery.
- [Instance](/docs/api/instance): The immutable serving identity of this LibreDash installation.
- [Projects](/docs/api/projects): Read-only project registry.
- [Releases](/docs/api/releases): Immutable project releases and artifacts.
- [Current User](/docs/api/current-user): Current principal, sessions, tokens, and privileges.
- [Workspaces](/docs/api/workspaces): Workspace and lineage discovery.
- [Search](/docs/api/search): Progressive workspace discovery across BI assets.
- [BI](/docs/api/bi): Dashboard and semantic model read APIs.
- [Deployments](/docs/api/deployments): Atomic project release deployment.
- [Refresh Runs](/docs/api/refresh-runs): Headless refresh run operations.
- [Agent](/docs/api/agent): Headless agent conversation and run operations.
- [Access](/docs/api/access): Principals, groups, roles, and role bindings.
- [Audit](/docs/api/audit): Workspace audit event discovery.
- [Managed Data](/docs/api/managed-data): Project-global managed-data revisions and uploads.

#### Charts

- [Chart types](/docs/charts/overview): Choose from every supported LibreDash visual type.
- [Line chart](/docs/charts/line): Configuration and query shape for the Line chart visual.
- [Area chart](/docs/charts/area): Configuration and query shape for the Area chart visual.
- [Bar chart](/docs/charts/bar): Configuration and query shape for the Bar chart visual.
- [Column chart](/docs/charts/column): Configuration and query shape for the Column chart visual.
- [Pie chart](/docs/charts/pie): Configuration and query shape for the Pie chart visual.
- [Donut chart](/docs/charts/donut): Configuration and query shape for the Donut chart visual.
- [Scatter chart](/docs/charts/scatter): Configuration and query shape for the Scatter chart visual.
- [Funnel chart](/docs/charts/funnel): Configuration and query shape for the Funnel chart visual.
- [Treemap](/docs/charts/treemap): Configuration and query shape for the Treemap visual.
- [Gauge](/docs/charts/gauge): Configuration and query shape for the Gauge visual.
- [Heatmap](/docs/charts/heatmap): Configuration and query shape for the Heatmap visual.
- [Sankey](/docs/charts/sankey): Configuration and query shape for the Sankey visual.
- [Graph](/docs/charts/graph): Configuration and query shape for the Graph visual.
- [Map](/docs/charts/map): Configuration and query shape for the Map visual.
- [Candlestick chart](/docs/charts/candlestick): Configuration and query shape for the Candlestick chart visual.
- [Boxplot](/docs/charts/boxplot): Configuration and query shape for the Boxplot visual.
- [Combo chart](/docs/charts/combo): Configuration and query shape for the Combo chart visual.
- [Waterfall chart](/docs/charts/waterfall): Configuration and query shape for the Waterfall chart visual.
- [Histogram](/docs/charts/histogram): Configuration and query shape for the Histogram visual.
- [Radar chart](/docs/charts/radar): Configuration and query shape for the Radar chart visual.
- [Tree](/docs/charts/tree): Configuration and query shape for the Tree visual.
- [Sunburst](/docs/charts/sunburst): Configuration and query shape for the Sunburst visual.
- [KPI](/docs/charts/kpi): Configuration and query shape for the KPI visual.

### Architecture and contributing


#### Architecture

- [Architecture overview](/docs/architecture): See how the monolith, contracts, storage, and browser components fit together.
- [Runtime architecture](/docs/architecture/runtime): Follow routing, query execution, and streamed UI updates.
- [Storage architecture](/docs/storage-architecture): Understand DuckLake, DuckDB, snapshots, and serving pointers.
- [Datastar signal flow](/docs/architecture/datastar): Understand server-owned state and SSE response contracts.
- [Visual plugin architecture](/docs/architecture/visual-plugins): Understand renderer-neutral shapes and renderer adapters.

#### Contributing

- [Repository and development workflow](/docs/contributing/repository): Work effectively in the LibreDash monorepo.
- [Add a visual type](/docs/contributing/visual): Extend contracts, rendering, documentation, and tests together.
- [Add a configuration resource](/docs/contributing/configuration): Extend schemas, generated references, and validation together.
- [Write documentation](/docs/contributing/documentation): Author procedural guides and accessible diagrams that remain valid with the product.
